title: Three Pillars of Broker Compliance
alt: Three pillars of UK medicines broker registration compliance

items.label: Classify Activity Correctly
items.desc: Broking, not wholesale: never own, hold or supply stock.

items.label: GDP Quality System
items.desc: Real, proportionate, documented system per ICH Q9 and Q10.

items.label: Counterparty Qualification
items.desc: Verify both sides; evidence with dated ALCOA+ records.
